# Repo Map (auto-generated — DO NOT EDIT)

Generated by `node tool/doc_guard/run.mjs generate` at commit `c24aafff`.
Cold-start summary for agent sessions: read this BEFORE exploring the repo by hand.
If it looks stale (commit far behind HEAD), regenerate it first.

## Database — Drift schema v6

- `decks`: id, folder_id, name, target_language, sort_order, created_at, updated_at
- `flashcards`: id, deck_id, front, back, example_sentence, pronunciation, hint, sort_order, created_at, updated_at
- `flashcard_progress`: flashcard_id, box_number, due_at, buried_until, is_suspended, review_count, lapse_count, last_studied_at
- `flashcard_tags`: flashcard_id, tag, PRIMARY
- `folders`: id, parent_id, name, content_mode, sort_order, created_at, updated_at
- `study_attempts`: id, session_item_id, result, study_mode, box_before, box_after, user_input, attempted_at
- `study_match_evaluations`: id, session_id, session_item_id, flashcard_id, board_index, pair_id, selected_front_cell_id, selected_back_cell_id, expected_front_flashcard_id, expected_back_flashcard_id, is_correct, attempt_order, evaluated_at, created_at
- `study_sessions`: id, entry_type, entry_ref_id, study_type, status, started_at, updated_at
- `study_session_items`: id, session_id, flashcard_id, sort_order, answered_at, created_at, updated_at

| `/` | `RoutePaths.root` | ✅ |

Placeholders are wired in `lib/app/router/app_router.dart` / feature route files.

## Domain

- Use cases: folder(9), deck(5), flashcard(11), search(1) + study(11: StartStudySessionUseCase, RestartStudySessionUseCase, LoadStudySessionReviewUseCase, LoadStudySessionResultUseCase, RecordStudySessionAnswerUseCase, RecordMatchEvaluationUseCase, LoadDashboardResumeSessionSummaryUseCase, FinalizeStudySessionUseCase, CancelStudySessionUseCase, BuryStudySessionCardUseCase, SuspendStudySessionCardUseCase)
- Repository ports: `card_history_repository.dart`, `flashcard_bulk_repository.dart`, `flashcard_repository.dart`, `folder_repository.dart`, `learning_settings_repository.dart`, `progress_repository.dart`, `search_repository.dart`, `tag_repository.dart` + `lib/domain/study/ports/study_repo.dart`
